case_title: HUMAM W ALBAROODI VS. JESSICA HANSMANN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT HANSMANN, JESSICA HEARING SET FOR JAN-25-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALBAROODI, HUMAM W AS TO DEFENDANT HANSMANN, JESSICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALBAROODI, HUMAM W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANSMANN, JESSICA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,195.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 120.00 - SERVED OCT-28-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HANSMANN, JESSICA
COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT HANSMANN, JESSICA

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JESSICA HANSMANN ON JAN-25-2016 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDAND DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
